headline: Trump Graceland Grooves 🍑👑 Iran Ultimatum U-TURN 🚀💥
text:
Trump 🍊👨‍💼 the DEALMAKER DADDY 🤑🤝 dropping ULTIMATUMS 💣⏰ on Iran mullahs 🕌😡 like '48 HOURS or we BLACKOUT your OIL RIGS 🛢️🚫⚫️!' Strait of Hormuz 🚢🚫 clogged AF, US jets 🛩️💥 Israeli bros 🇮🇱 blasting Iranian targets 🔥🎯 while ayatollahs yeet DRONES 🦾💨 and MISSILES 🚀 at Uncle Sam 🦅 and ME allies! War BRRRR 😤💥 but Donnie swings to GOLF ⛳️🌴 at Mar-a-Lago 🏖️🍹 then 'constructive TALKS' 🤝😏 with mystery Persian bigwig 👻 – STRIKES PAUSED 5 DAYS ⏸️📅 cuz 'MAJOR POINTS OF AGREEMENT' 🧠✅ 'They WANNA DEAL bby 👼, we DO TOO!' Markets MOON 🚀📈 oil PRICES PLUMMET 📉🛢️ – from HEARTBREAK HOTEL 😢🏨 to investor ORGY 💦🤑!

Flying to MEMPHIS 🎸🇺🇸, Trump pumps up National Guard SIMPS 💪🛡️ crediting HIS TROOPS for CRIME DROP 📉🔒 in Elvis town! Then GRACELAND PILGRIMAGE 👑🏠 – Donnie channeling KING OF ROCK 'N' ROLL 🕺💃, eyeing those THICC JUMPSUITS 🍑✨ and saying 'HURT is my JAM 🎶😩' but frfr it's NOW OR NEVER ⏰🍆 for Iran peace! Reports of PHONE BONE 🔊📞 with BIBI NETANYAHU 🦁🇮🇱 and DIRECT TALKS tease 👀🤔 – diplomatic WHEELS SPINNING 🌀 even as mullahs on state TV 📰😏 claim Trump BACKED DOWN 🐔💨 from Truth Social flex 📱🔥. No deets on '15 POINTS' 🤫 but WALL STREET CUMMING BUCKETS 💸💦!

Iran DENIES chats 🚫🗣️, calls it BLUFF but global markets like 'YAS QUEEN' 📈😍 – new 5-DAY COUNTDOWN ⏳💣 to power grid SMACKDOWN ⚡🚫 ticking! Is this BREAKTHROUGH 🚀✨ or Donnie buying TIME like Elvis buying BLUE SUEDE SHOES 👞🔵? From war WHIPLASH 😵‍💫 to Graceland VIBES 🕺, Trump's MIXING DIPLOMACY 🍹🤝 with SURREAL SWINGS 🎢 – suspicious minds? Nah, it's VIVA LAS VEGAS 🏜️🎰 for PEACE DEAL orgy! Elvis would be PROUD 👻👍, Trump the ULTIMATE SHOWMAN 🎪🍊 thrusting that NEGOTIATOR DONG 🍆🤑!
